title: Cancer Diagnostic Centre in Mumbai, India | Surgical Pathology Lab in Mumbai | Parikshan Lab
description: Parikshan Lab is one of the best Clinical Diagnostic Centre & Surgical Pathology Lab in Mumbai. We Exclusive focus on Histopathology, Cytology & IHC. Parikshan Lab provide the highest quality diagnosis with the latest technology & lowest possible turnaround time.

About Dr. Gauri Experienced Professional ! Dr. Gauri Chapolikar Vidolkar is an MD Pathologist with a gold medal from one of India's top colleges Kasturba Medical College (Mangalore), Manipal University. She completed her MBBS from LTMMC Sion Hospital, Mumbai. She has worked extensively and exclusively in the field of Histopathology, Cytology, Immunohistochemistry with prime focus on Oncopathology. Prior to starting her own lab, she worked as a Consultant at Centre of Excellence for Histopathology, SRL Diagnostics. She is also accredited by NABL as an authorised signatory in histopathology.
